summary: Focana 2.2.2 is a focused hotfix for compact mode and the new task builder controls.
improvements: Quick start now appears before Add subtask when you are setting up a new task.
A clear Next button now appears at the bottom of the task builder after you enter a task.
fixes: Clicking subtasks in compact mode no longer grabs the window or leaves the preview cut off.
The floating re-entry snooze flow now uses a more reliable test path so release checks catch timing issues cleanly.
